title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Direct

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Direct
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
